mapper.select:
SELECT employee.user_id , employee.company_id , employee.employee_code , employee.employee_name , employee.no_use , employee.employee_no , IFNULL(employee.myself, 2) AS myself , employee.birth , employee.sex , employee.email , employee.mobile , employee.zipcode , employee.address1 , employee.address2 , employee.depart , employee.title , employee_checkup.notok_guide , employee_checkup.notok_reserve , employee_checkup.notok_urge , employee_checkup.notok_updated_at , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND (employee_checkup.notok_urge != 0 OR employee_checkup.notok_reserve != 0 OR employee_checkup.notok_guide != 0)
AND company_checkup.company_id = #{companyId} AND company_checkup.checkup_year = #{checkupYear}

# NotitokMapper.selectCheckupInfoList SELECT employee.user_id , employee.company_id , employee.employee_code , employee.employee_name , employee.no_use , employee.employee_no , IFNULL(employee.myself, 2) AS myself , employee.birth , employee.sex , employee.email , employee.mobile , employee.zipcode , employee.address1 , employee.address2 , employee.depart , employee.title , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id , employee_checkup.notok_guide AS notok_guide , !employee_checkup.notok_guide AS check_guide , employee_checkup.notok_updated_at FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee.no_use = 0 JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee.mobile IS NOT NULL AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 AND employee.myself = 1 AND company_checkup.company_checkup_id = #{companyCheckupId}

# NotitokMapper.selectUrgeList SELECT employee.user_id , employee.company_id , employee.employee_code , employee.employee_name , employee.no_use , employee.employee_no , IFNULL(employee.myself, 2) AS myself , employee.birth , employee.sex , employee.email , employee.mobile , employee.zipcode , employee.address1 , employee.address2 , employee.depart , employee.title , employee_checkup.support_type , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id , employee_checkup.notok_urge AS notok_guide , !employee_checkup.notok_urge AS check_guide , employee_checkup.notok_updated_at FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee.no_use = 0 JOIN company_checkup ON company_checkup.company_checkup_id = employee_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id AND (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_type_id = company_checkup_type.company_checkup_type_id WHERE reservation.reservation_state IS NULL AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 AND employee.mobile IS NOT NULL AND company_checkup.company_checkup_id = #{companyCheckupId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 0 , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id , employee.employee_name , employee.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{기업체명}', company.company_name), '\#{기업체코드}', company.company_code), '\#{검진시작일~검진마감일}', CONCAT(DATE(company_checkup.checkup_date_begin), '~', DATE(company_checkup.checkup_date_end))), '\#{예약마감일}', DATE(company_checkup.reserve_date_end)) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON employee.company_id = company.company_id AND company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id WHERE employee_checkup_id IN
#{vo.employeeCheckupId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 0 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 0 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 5 , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id , employee.employee_name , employee.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{임직원 이름}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(employee_myself.employee_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')), '\#{검진자 이름}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(employee.employee_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')), '\#{001001}', company.company_code), '\#{검진시작일~검진마감일}', CONCAT(DATE(company_checkup.checkup_date_begin), '~', DATE(company_checkup.checkup_date_end))), '\#{예약마감일}', DATE(company_checkup.reserve_date_end)) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN (SELECT employee_code, employee_name, CC.company_checkup_id FROM employee JOIN company C ON employee.company_id = C.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id WHERE employee.myself = 1 AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL) employee_myself ON employee.employee_code = employee_myself.employee_code AND employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = employee_myself.company_checkup_id JOIN company_checkup ON company_checkup.company_checkup_id = employee_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON employee.company_id = company.company_id AND company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id LEFT JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id AND (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) WHERE reservation.reservation_state IS NULL AND employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id IN
#{vo.employeeCheckupId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 5 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 5 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 1 , reservation.employee_checkup_id , reservation.reservation_name , reservation.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{고객명}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(reservation.reservation_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')), '\#{병원명}', hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name), '\#{병원전화번호}', sf_phone_hyphen(hospital_center_view.telephone)), '\#{검진희망일}', DATE(reservation.desired_at)) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM reservation JOIN employee_checkup ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.notok_reserve = 0 JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type ON reservation.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN hospital_center_view ON checkup_contract_type.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 1 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 1 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 2 , reservation.employee_checkup_id , reservation.reservation_name , reservation.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{고객명}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(reservation.reservation_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')), '\#{병원명}', hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name), '\#{병원전화번호}', sf_phone_hyphen(hospital_center_view.telephone)), '\#{검진확정일}', DATE(reservation.desired_at)) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM reservation JOIN employee_checkup ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.notok_reserve = 0 JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type ON reservation.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN hospital_center_view ON checkup_contract_type.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id WHERE reservation_id IN
#{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 2 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 2 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 3 , reservation.employee_checkup_id , reservation.reservation_name , reservation.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{고객명}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(reservation.reservation_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM reservation JOIN employee_checkup ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.notok_reserve = 0 WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 3 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 3 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , created_at , created_user_id) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , 4 , reservation.employee_checkup_id , reservation.reservation_name , reservation.mobile , 0 , REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{message}, '\#{고객명}', AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(reservation.reservation_name), 'volk_ggsj.co.kr!')), '\#{병원명}', hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name), '\#{검진희망일}', DATE(reservation.desired_at)) , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM reservation JOIN employee_checkup ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.notok_reserve = 0 JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type ON reservation.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN hospital_center_view ON checkup_contract_type.center_id = hospital_center_view.center_id WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 4 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 4 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert: # NotitokMapper.insertNotitokUsSentFind INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , data , created_at , created_user_id) VALUES ( UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , 1 , NOW() , 6 , #{employeeCheckupId} , #{employeeName} , #{mobile} , 0 , #{message} , #{data} , NOW() , 1)
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 6 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 6 AND mid = 0
mapper.insert: # NotitokMapper.insertNotitokUsSentFindPw INSERT INTO notitok_us_sent( message_id , sent_user_id , sent_at , message_type , employee_checkup_id , recv_name , mobile , mid , message , data , created_at , created_user_id) VALUES ( UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) , 1 , NOW() , 6 , #{employeeCheckupId} , #{employeeName} , #{mobile} , 0 , #{message} , #{data} , NOW() , 1)
mapper.select: SELECT notitok_us_sent_id, sent_user_id, sent_at, message_type, employee_checkup_id, recv_name, mobile, mid, message, created_at, created_user_id FROM notitok_us_sent WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 6 AND mid = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notitok_us_sent SET mid = #{mid} WHERE message_id = UUID_TO_BIN(#{messageId}) AND message_type = 6 AND mid = 0
mapper.select: # NotitokMapper.notitokCheck SELECT e.employee_code, c.company_name, c.created_at, ntt.sent_at FROM notitok_us_sent ntt JOIN employee_checkup ec on ntt.employee_checkup_id = ec.employee_checkup_id JOIN employee e on ec.user_id = e.user_id JOIN company c on e.company_id = c.company_id WHERE ntt.recv_name = #{recvNameCrypt} AND ntt.mobile = #{mobile} AND ntt.data = #{data}

# NotitokMapper.checkDataPw SELECT e.employee_code, c.company_name, e.user_id, c.company_id, e.birth, e.mobile, e.employee_no FROM notitok_us_sent ntt JOIN employee_checkup ec on ntt.employee_checkup_id = ec.employee_checkup_id JOIN employee e on ec.user_id = e.user_id JOIN company c on e.company_id = c.company_id WHERE e.employee_code = #{employeeCode} AND ntt.recv_name = #{recvNameCrypt} AND ntt.mobile = #{mobile} AND ntt.data = #{data}
